units.content: Savojardo et al. conduct a large-scale pairwise comparison of AlphaFold2 and ESMFold on human enzymes using Pfam functional annotation, in Journal of Molecular Biology, 2025
This study is a direct observational comparison of the two predictors that claim 8a treats as a worked example
The overlap with the worked example in claim 8a raises a potential FTO concern
Specification §4.14 characterizes Savojardo et al. as observational and post-hoc
Savojardo et al. is not a pre-registered architectural predictor, distinguishing it from claim 8a
The observational and post-hoc nature of Savojardo et al. mitigates the FTO risk, as claim 8a operates on architectural-attribute set differences rather than post-hoc empirical measurements
